title: Termination of Chapter
doc_html:
NOTE: Terminates on June 30, 2023. See R.S. 51:2377.

§2377. Termination of Chapter

            The provisions of this Chapter shall terminate on June 30, 2023, and thereafter shall be null, void, and without effect.

            Acts 2018, No. 327, §1; Acts 2020, No. 21, §1, eff. June 4, 2020.

NOTE: This Section is updated through the 2020 First Extraordinary Session, but is subject to final technical revisions by the Louisiana State Law Institute.
doc_text:
NOTE:  Terminates on June 30, 2023. See R.S. 51:2377.
§2377.  Termination of Chapter
The provisions of this Chapter shall terminate on June 30, 2023, and thereafter shall
be null, void, and without effect.
Acts 2018, No. 327, §1; Acts 2020, No. 21, §1, eff. June 4, 2020.
NOTE:  This Section is updated through the 2020 First Extraordinary
Session, but is subject to final technical revisions by the Louisiana State Law
Institute.
